name: market-regime-oracle
title: Market Regime Oracle
track: BNB Chain AI Trading Agent Edition — Track 2 (Strategy Skills)
summary: Conclusion-first 5-state BTC market-regime classifier (RISK_ON / RANGE_BOUND / RISK_OFF / CAPITULATION / EUPHORIA) with a documented trading posture per regime, backtested vs buy-and-hold.
use_when: You need a single explainable answer to 'what kind of market is this and how much risk should I take' — for daily risk budgeting, BTC sizing, or a regime gate on top of other CMC skills.
do_not_use_for: Live trade execution, order routing, wallet actions, or token launches. Research/backtest signal only.

tools.name: get_market_regime
tools.description: Classify current BTC regime + return posture read and backtest context.

tools.name: list_regimes
tools.description: Return the 5 regimes with documented postures.

RANGE_BOUND.action: Sideways / choppy — light exposure, hold core.

RISK_OFF.action: Downtrend / defensive — reduce risk, raise cash to 80%.

CAPITULATION.action: Panic sell-off / max defensive — near-full cash.

EUPHORIA.action: Blow-off top — take profit, reduce to 30%, fade strength.

limits: Research/backtest aid, not a trade instruction or financial advice.
Funding-rate and exchange-flow signals are documented proxies (no free public feed); not fabricated real data.
Default backtest window is ~1 year (CoinGecko free public tier daily-history cap without a demo key).
hard_rules: Track 2 only — no live trading, wallet, or token launch.
Not submitted to any external portal; admin approves all submissions.
